text: Stepping through the entrance, I am struck by the intersection of the practical—the fire safety equipment, the careful architecture—and the imaginative. As I approach the exhibit marked R+D, I am drawn to the words glowing on the wall, asking questions of coexistence, progress, and human connection. I feel both curious and uncertain, as though I'm entering a space that demands not only observation, but personal introspection. There is an undercurrent of vulnerability and hope in the air. In this liminal zone between exterior safety and interior reflection, I feel the urge to understand, and to be understood.
